title: Support

empty: You haven't opened any tickets yet.

newDialog.messagePlaceholder: What happened? Steps to reproduce, screenshots, what you expected...
newDialog.createdToast: Ticket opened. We'll get back to you shortly.

detail.noReplies: No replies yet — we'll get to it soon.

quickIssues.title: What do you need help with?

issues.accountLoginSubject: Help with my account or login

kb.title: Help center
kb.subtitle: Search guides, FAQs, and policies — or chat with our AI assistant before opening a ticket.
kb.stillNeedHelp: Still need help? Open a ticket
kb.suggestedBeforeTicket: These articles might help before you submit:
kb.loginResetBody: Use Forgot password on the login page. Check spam for the reset email. Links expire after 24 hours.
kb.courseAccessBody: Wait a few minutes and refresh. If still locked, confirm payment in Payment history and contact support with your receipt.
kb.paymentBody: Verify card details and try again. For duplicate charges, open a billing ticket with the transaction date and amount.
kb.certificateBody: Ensure all lessons and required assignments are complete. Certificates appear under My Classes → course → Certificate.
kb.videoBody: Try another browser, disable ad blockers, and check your connection. Use Report a problem on the lesson page for course-specific issues.
kb.studentStartBody: Browse the catalog, enroll in courses, and track progress from My Classes. Use Calendar for live sessions.
kb.studentAssignmentsBody: Open Assignments, select the task, upload files before the due date, and confirm the submitted status.
kb.instructorPublishBody: Complete all required sections, set pricing, then submit for review from the course editor. Draft courses are not visible to students.
kb.instructorUploadBody: Use supported formats (MP4, PDF). Large files may take several minutes. If upload fails, retry on a stable connection.
kb.instructorPayoutBody: View earnings under Teacher → Earnings. Payouts follow the marketplace schedule in your instructor agreement.
kb.videoTourStudentBody: A quick walkthrough of enrolling, watching lessons, and tracking progress.
kb.videoTourInstructorBody: How to create courses, upload content, and manage students.
kb.policyPrivacyBody: We protect learner data per applicable regulations. Admins may access records for support and compliance only.
kb.policyRefundBody: Refunds for eligible purchases within 14 days unless otherwise stated on the course page.
kb.policyConductBody: Respectful communication is required in messages and discussions. Violations may lead to account suspension.

ai.title: AI support assistant
ai.subtitle: First-line help · suggests articles · detects urgency
ai.greeting: Hi! I'm the AcademiX support assistant. Tell me what's going wrong — login, a course, payment, a lesson video — and I'll walk you through it.
ai.urgencyDetected: Detected priority: {{level}} — we'll prioritize your ticket.

intents.greeting: I'm doing well, thanks for asking! I'm here to help with AcademiX — courses, payments, login, certificates, assignments, or anything on the platform. What's on your mind?
intents.thanks: You're welcome! If anything else comes up, just ask. You can also open a support ticket anytime using the button below.
intents.goodbye: Goodbye! Hope I could help. Come back anytime or open a ticket if you need a human agent.
intents.manager: You can reach our support team by opening a ticket below — describe your issue and a specialist (or supervisor for escalations) will reply in-app and by email. For billing disputes, mention "billing" in your message so it routes to the right team. Urgent issues are prioritized automatically.
intents.explicitTicket: Sure — use the Open support ticket button below. We'll pre-fill your message so the team has full context.
intents.login:
For login and account issues, try resetting your password from the login page and check your spam folder for the verification email.

{{tip}}
intents.payment:
For billing or subscription problems, check Payment history under your profile first. If a charge looks wrong, note the date and amount before contacting us.

{{tip}}
intents.courseAccess:
If a course stays locked after enrollment, wait a few minutes and refresh. Make sure payment completed successfully.

{{tip}}
intents.certificate:
Certificates appear after you complete all required lessons and assignments. Check the course progress bar first.

{{tip}}
intents.video:
If a lesson video won't play, try another browser, disable ad blockers, and check your internet connection. You can also use **Report a problem** on the lesson page.

{{tip}}
intents.assignment:
To submit an assignment, go to Assignments, open the task, upload your file, and confirm you see a submitted status before the due date.

{{tip}}
intents.instructor: For instructor topics — publishing a course, uploading content, or payouts — check the Instructor guides in the Help center or tell me which step is failing and I'll guide you.
intents.bug: Sorry you're hitting a bug! Note what you clicked, any error message, and your browser. Screenshots help a lot. You can open a ticket below and attach files.
intents.feature: We love feature ideas! Share what you'd like improved and why it would help your learning or teaching. The product team reviews feedback tickets regularly.
intents.generalHelp: I'm here to help. Can you tell me a bit more — is it about login, a specific course, payment, a lesson video, or something else?
intents.clarify: I want to make sure I understand — what were you trying to do, and what happened instead? (e.g. "I paid but the course is still locked")
intents.followUp: Got it. Can you add any error messages, course names, or screenshots you have? That helps me give you the right steps.
intents.persistentIssue: Sounds like the usual fixes didn't work. I'd recommend opening a support ticket below — our team can look at your account directly. Include everything you've already tried.

admin.title: Support inbox
admin.subtitle: Every ticket opened by users. Triage by changing status, priority, or assignee.
admin.escalationNote: Ticket escalated by support staff — requires supervisor attention.
